---
title: Test 3 Platform Post 2
subtitle: ''
description: One or two sentences.
abstract: ''
author:
- name: ''
  affiliation: ''
  orcid: ''
  email: ''
date: '2026-07-14'
date-modified: last-modified
categories:
- data-science
- r
- linguistics
- pottery
- aikido
- brug
- personal
- reproducibility
- productivity
- coding
status: published
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-title: Contents
    number-sections: true
    embed-resources: false
    css: styles.css
    include-before-body: ../../_partials/blog-nav.html
execute:
  include: true
  echo: true
  message: false
  error: false
path: posts/2026-07-14-test-3-platform-post-2/index.qmd
---

Second test to erwinlares.com, The Burrows, and Capital Aikikai of Wisconsin sites
